comment:
core/skill_loader.zig — Unified SKILL.md paragraph loading.

 Consolidates:
   - query_engine.zig:loadSkillPara()
   - staged.zig:loadSkillExcerpt()
   - staged.zig:parseSkillDocContent()

 parseSkillDocContent delegates to doc_parser.parseSkillDocContent
 (single source of truth for SKILL.md front-matter stripping).

members.name: loadSkillExcerpt
members.signature: fn loadSkillExcerpt(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, guidance_dir: []const u8, cwd: []const u8, skill_name: []const u8) -> ?[]const u8

members.name: parseSkillDocContent
members.signature: fn parseSkillDocContent(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, content: []const u8) -> ?[]const u8
